title: Ubiquiti G6 Pro Bullet - 8MP IP Camera, White
description: Ubiquiti G6 Pro Bullet features an 8MP sensor (3840 x 2160px) at 30 fps, a varifocal lens (2.36x optical zoom), and adaptive IR illumination for night vision up to 40 meters. The camera has a durable housing made of aluminum and polycarbonate, with IP66 protection against dust and powerful water jets. It connects to the network via Gigabit LAN with PoE support (37 to 57V DC) and a maximum power consumption of 15W 4K (8MP), 30 FPS video (3840 x 2160px) Advanced AI detection of various objects and events Night mode with IR LEDs and IR cut filter IP66 weather-resistant housing IK04 tamper resistance Power via PoE (37 to 57V DC) Managed through UniFi Protect software Built-in microphones and speaker White color Device Screws, wall plugs Wall/ceiling and pole mounts
